full_text:
Meng Jian (Gongwei) 孟建 (公威)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Jian (孟建), styledGongwei (公威). Friend of Xu Shu and Zhuge Liang. Joined Wei. Became Inspector of Liang Province. Meng Jian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
